/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/DairyManagementSystem.dir/src/DairyManagementSystem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DairyManagementSystem.dir/src/DairyProduct.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DairyManagementSystem.dir/src/Employee.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DairyManagementSystem.dir/src/Inventory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DairyManagementSystem.dir/src/MilkBatch.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DairyManagementSystem.dir/src/Person.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DairyManagementSystem.dir/src/ProductionBatch.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DairyManagementSystem.dir/src/QualityTest.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DairyManagementSystem.dir/src/SalesOrder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DairyManagementSystem.dir/src/Supplier.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DairyManagementSystem.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o DairyManagementSystem
